final_prompt.prompt:
Create a documentary-style editorial photograph for a 微博 news/trending post, horizontal banner format.

Style/medium: needs a photojournalistic, high-end mobile-shot documentary aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 horizontal wide banner with generous negative space for text overlay; skyline as primary horizontal subject
Subject: must include a city dusk skyline with neon lights coming on, hurrying pedestrians in the foreground, and distant skyscrapers reflecting the last sunlight
Scene/backdrop: must include an urban dusk scene — neon signs beginning to glow, golden-hour sunlight reflecting off high-rise glass, real street-level atmosphere
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic dusk atmosphere with high contrast between warm sunset reflections and cool neon glow — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm-to-cool dusk direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sharp, high-resolution 8K-texture documentary surface treatment — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, primary, bold/modern typeface, prominent position), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (medium, secondary, subtitle), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (small, watermark, bottom-right or bottom area)
Constraints: must preserve strict 16:9 horizontal ratio; must leave sufficient clear zones for text overlays; overall look must feel like a real viral 微博 trending post cover image
Avoid:
